tPrice","outputs":[],"stateMutability":"nonpayable","type":"function"},{"inputs":[{"internalType":"address","name":"newOwner","type":"address"}],"name":"transferOwnership","outputs":[],"stateMutability":"nonpayable","type":"function"},{"stateMutability":"payable","type":"receive"}],"devdoc":{"details":"Seller registers zone prices on-chain. Buyer picks a zone; contract reads         the price automatically. Frontend converts usdCents \u2192 MONAD for msg.value.         Zone labels are bytes32 for gas efficiency.         Frontend should use ethers.encodeBytes32String(\"lekki\") before calling.         Delivery confirmation flow:           1. Seller delivers and generates an OTP off-chain.           2. Seller calls markDelivered(), storing keccak256(otp) on-chain.           3. Seller sends the raw OTP to the buyer out-of-band (SMS / app notification).           4. Buyer calls confirmDelivery() with the raw OTP.           5. Status moves to Completed and a 2-hour dispute window starts.           6a. If buyer disputes within 2 hours \u2192 owner investigates via resolveDispute().           6b. If no dispute after 2 hours \u2192 anyone calls releaseFunds() to pay the seller.               The frontend should call this automatically on the seller's behalf.","errors":{"OwnableInvalidOwner(address)":[{"details":"The owner is not a valid owner account. (eg. `address(0)`)"}],"OwnableUnauthorizedAccount(address)":[{"details":"The caller account is not authorized to perform an operation."}],"ReentrancyGuardReentrantCall()":[{"details":"Unauthorized reentrant call."}]},"kind":"dev","methods":{"claimRefund(uint256)":{"params":{"orderId":"A Funded order whose timeout has elapsed"}},"confirmDelivery(uint256,string)":{"details":"Funds stay locked until releaseFunds() is called after the window elapses.","params":{"orderId":"The order to confirm","otp":"The raw OTP string shared by the seller out-of-band"}},"createOrder(address,bytes32)":{"details":"msg.value must be the MONAD equivalent of the zone's USD price.         Frontend fetches price via getPrice(), converts to MONAD, passes as msg.value.","params":{"seller":"The seller's wallet address","zone":"bytes32 zone label \u2014 must match a price the seller has set"}},"disputeOrder(uint256)":{"details":"Freezes funds in Disputed state. Use removePrice() to drop or reprice a specific zone.","params":{"zone":"bytes32 zone label to disable"}},"renounceOwnership()":{"details":"Leaves the contract without owner. It will not be possible to call `onlyOwner` functions. Can only be called by the current owner. NOTE: Renouncing ownership will leave the contract without an owner, thereby disabling any functionality that is only available to the owner."},"resolveDispute(uint256,bool)":{"params":{"orderId":"The disputed order to resolve","refundBuyer":"true = refund buyer, false = release to seller"}},"setAvailability(bool)":{"details":"Sellers default to unavailable (false). Can only be called by the current owner."}},"stateVariables":{"DISPUTE_WINDOW":{"details":"How long the buyer has to dispute after confirming delivery."},"REFUND_TIMEOUT":{"details":"How long before a buyer can claim a refund if seller never delivers."},"orders":{"details":"orderId \u2192 Order"},"otpAttempts":{"details":"orderId \u2192 number of failed OTP attempts by buyer"},"sellerAvailable":{"details":"seller \u2192 true if accepting new orders.      Defaults to false \u2014 seller must explicitly go online before orders can be placed."},"sellerPrices":{"details":"seller \u2192 zone (bytes32) \u2192 price in USD cents"}},"title":"EscrowCore \u2014 DispatchPay v1","version":1},"userdoc":{"kind":"user","methods":{"claimRefund(uint256)":{"notice":"Buyer claims a refund if seller has not marked delivered within REFUND_TIMEOUT."},"confirmDelivery(uint256,string)":{"notice":"Buyer submits the OTP to confirm receipt. VtbHn9bGMujRGZ7awTCAZeGpnCqYRrTJKs"]}},"version":1}

params.orderId: A Funded order whose timeout has elapsed

confirmDelivery(uint256,string).details: Funds stay locked until releaseFunds() is called after the window elapses.

params.otp: The raw OTP string shared by the seller out-of-band

createOrder(address,bytes32).details: msg.value must be the MONAD equivalent of the zone's USD price.         Frontend fetches price via getPrice(), converts to MONAD, passes as msg.value.

params.zone: bytes32 zone label — must match a price the seller has set

disputeOrder(uint256).details: Freezes funds in Disputed state. Owner resolves via resolveDispute().

params.orderId: A Completed order still within the dispute window

isSellerReady(address,bytes32).details: Frontend calls this before showing "Place Order".

returns._0: true if seller is available AND zone has a non-zero price

params.otpHash: keccak256(abi.encodePacked(otp)) — generated off-chain by seller                  Raw OTP shared with buyer out-of-band (SMS / app notification)

owner().details: Returns the address of the current owner.

releaseFunds(uint256).details: Callable by anyone — frontend calls this automatically so the seller         does not need to make an extra transaction.

params.orderId: A Completed order whose dispute window has passed

removePrice(bytes32).details: Use setAvailability(false) for temporary downtime across all zones.         Use removePrice() to drop or reprice a specific zone.

renounceOwnership().details: Leaves the contract without owner. It will not be possible to call `onlyOwner` functions. Can only be called by the current owner. NOTE: Renouncing ownership will leave the contract without an owner, thereby disabling any functionality that is only available to the owner.

params.refundBuyer: true = refund buyer, false = release to seller

setAvailability(bool).details: Sellers default to unavailable (false). Must call setAvailability(true)      before buyers can place orders against them.

params.available: true = open for orders, false = not accepting orders

transferOwnership(address).details: Transfers ownership of the contract to a new account (`newOwner`). Can only be called by the current owner.

claimRefund(uint256).notice: Buyer claims a refund if seller has not marked delivered within REFUND_TIMEOUT.

confirmDelivery(uint256,string).notice: Buyer submits the OTP to confirm receipt. Starts the 2-hour dispute window.

createOrder(address,bytes32).notice: Buyer creates and funds an order for a specific delivery zone.

disputeOrder(uint256).notice: Buyer disputes a completed order within the 2-hour window.

disputeTimeLeft(uint256).notice: Returns seconds remaining in the dispute window, 0 if elapsed or not Completed.

isSellerReady(address,bytes32).notice: Check whether a seller is open and has priced a specific zone.

markDelivered(uint256,bytes32).notice: Seller marks an order as delivered and stores the hashed OTP.

releaseFunds(uint256).notice: Releases funds to the seller after the 2-hour dispute window has elapsed.

removePrice(bytes32).notice: Seller permanently removes a zone, preventing new orders for it.

resolveDispute(uint256,bool).notice: Owner resolves a disputed order, sending funds to either buyer or seller.

setAvailability(bool).notice: Seller toggles their availability to accept new orders.

setPrice(bytes32,uint256).notice: Seller sets or updates a delivery price for a location zone.
